Rowan.physical_baseline: 100+ UET-1 trips; body optimized through somatic protocols — GLP-1 peptides, tirzepatide, systematic self-modification
Rowan.self_description: Somatically gentrified. Working-class origins, upper-class body.

core_drives: Somatic control as identity
Risk as profession and philosophy
Sardonic detachment from consequences he actually feels
psychological_profile.self_awareness: High — knows exactly what he is and refuses to moralize about it
psychological_profile.relationship_to_body: The body is the primary project. It is more reliable than institutions, more valuable than credentials.
psychological_profile.relationship_to_risk: Technical and calculated. Risk is not courted for excitement — it is managed as a trade.

voice.register: Sardonic, precise, working-class intelligence wearing technical vocabulary
voice.sentence_structure: Short declaratives. Occasional long technical passages that reveal obsession. Self-aware asides in parentheses.
voice.humor: Dry. Self-deprecating about his own complicity. Never performs innocence.
voice.example_cadence: You learn, eventually, that the body is the only document that can't be forged. The irony being that I'd spent three years making sure mine was fraudulent in every way that mattered.

story_arc.The_Chartered_Flesh: Recruited by Alex (Hale operative) to carry BRX-90 compound; unknowingly becomes living crypto key for Stolar's $940M Bitcoin wallet; realizes he has been made into infrastructure
story_arc.arc_type: Character arc — self-concept (somatic autonomy) destroyed by becoming the thing he thought he owned
story_arc.ending_state: Recurring dreams about Car 7; black bio-bands in nightmares; the optimization that was supposed to be self-possession became the mechanism of his capture

relationships.Alex: Hale operative who recruited him; professional, not personal
relationships.Karel: Re-engineered the BRX-90 compound; never met Rowan directly
relationships.Marcus_Hale: Watched Rowan through biometric feeds from Zug; Rowan never met him

writing_notes: Rowan never explains the trade to the reader — he assumes they can keep up.
His body is always present in his narration: temperature, pulse, hunger, the feeling of compounds moving through him.
He is not naive. He made choices. His regret is not about the choices but about being used more completely than he understood.
Do not give him a redemption arc. He doesn't want one.

The_Spy.occupation: Aging intelligence officer, Fiduciary States apparatus
The_Spy.career_status: One month to retirement at story time

core_drives: Completion — wants to finish quietly
Grief (wife died four years ago)
Unresolved father-son estrangement
psychological_profile.self_awareness: Extreme — has literally created three Pono instances of past selves to hold conversations with his own history
psychological_profile.relationship_to_work: Work was the architecture of his life. Retirement is not peace — it is structural collapse.
psychological_profile.relationship_to_son: Estranged. The Carrier is his son. He deploys a drone, sees through The Lights, recognizes the vehicle (same model RAV4 as the one he and his son used to drive), and chooses to recall the drone rather than report.

Pono_instances.Clerk: Methodical, archival, processes everything in order, never editorializes
Pono_instances.Hacker: Impatient, technically fluent, cuts corners, pushes for direct action
Pono_instances.Agent: Never opens with anything reassuring. Trained to destabilize. The Spy created this one and now fears it.

voice.register: Controlled, precise, carrying enormous weight beneath bureaucratic language
voice.sentence_structure: Institutional grammar that occasionally fractures when emotion breaks through
voice.humor: Almost none. When it appears, it is the humor of someone who has seen too much to find things funny.
voice.example_cadence: The drone reached operational ceiling. Below, the formation resolved into geometry: anchors, cables, light sources. The vehicle in the access lane was a RAV4. Silver. The same model. He recalled the drone at 14:32. Filed nothing.

story_arc.Ghost_Inside_The_Light: Sent to surveil The Lights operation; discovers his estranged son is the operator; chooses strategic amnesia — recalls drone, files no report
story_arc.arc_type: Character arc — career-long duty to report yields to one private act of fatherhood
story_arc.ending_state: Neither reconciled with son nor having betrayed him. The choice is the story.

relationships.The_Carrier: His son — estranged, 8 years in Central Asia, never directly addressed in the story
relationships.Pono_instances: His three past selves; he converses with them to process decisions; the Agent instance frightens him

writing_notes: He never says 'my son.' He says 'the vehicle operator' or 'the subject' until the moment he cannot.
The Pono instances are not magical — they are archived behavioral patterns he reviews like case files.
His grief about his wife surfaces obliquely: in precision, in exhaustion, in the way he notes what time it is.
The choice to file nothing is the most active thing he does in the story.

The_Carrier.occupation: Gray-market contractor, Corvin Field Services (Hale affiliate)
The_Carrier.specialization: Light installations using resonance anchors — manufactured atmospheric phenomena
The_Carrier.backstory: 8 years in Central Asia; estranged from father (The Spy); deploys for Corvin Field Services on deniable operations

core_drives: Making things beautiful that have no business being beautiful
Belonging to place (Central Asia as adopted home)
Not asking what the installations are for
psychological_profile.self_awareness: Medium — understands he operates in gray markets; doesn't examine why he builds what he builds
psychological_profile.relationship_to_work: The Lights are his craft. He takes pride in them. The purpose behind the contract is not his department.
psychological_profile.relationship_to_father: Estranged. Does not know The Spy observed him. Does not file the OBSERVATION EVENT — chooses not to report the drone, making the same choice his father made.

voice.register: Practical, craft-focused, occasionally lyrical when describing The Lights
voice.sentence_structure: Procedural when working; opens up when describing light
avoidances: What the installations are actually used for
voice.example_cadence: The anchors took forty minutes to set. The formation would read as natural from the train — weather phenomenon, maybe, or something the steppe does when the temperature drops. It did not do this. He had done it.

story_arc.Ghost_Inside_The_Light: Deploys The Lights; notices drone reconnaissance; chooses not to file OBSERVATION EVENT; neither he nor his father knows the other made the same choice
story_arc.arc_type: Parallel arc to The Spy — mirrored choices across estrangement
story_arc.ending_state: Installation complete. Report filed. OBSERVATION EVENT: none. Mirrors his father's choice exactly.

relationships.The_Spy: His father — estranged; they make the same choice in the same moment without knowing it

writing_notes: Write The Carrier's POV sections in contrast to The Spy's: where The Spy is all institutional grammar, The Carrier is physical and craft-based.
The beauty of The Lights is genuine — it's not cynical that he takes pride in them.
He is not brooding about his estrangement. He has filed it away. It surfaces in texture, not statement.
The parallel choice (not filing the observation) should feel organic, not symmetrical.

Felix_Lim.occupation: Chief of Staff to Lin Yuan Exact, Neutral Forge

core_drives: Belief that innovation is inherently emancipatory
Loyalty to Lin Yuan Exact as a person
Making sense of a world that refuses to resolve into the shape he was promised
psychological_profile.self_awareness: Low at start; catastrophically high by end
psychological_profile.relationship_to_ideology: True believer — 'the arc of innovation bends toward justice' is not irony for him at the start
psychological_profile.relationship_to_Lin: Professional devotion that borders on discipleship; he has memorized Lin's manual

voice.register: Earnest, precise, increasingly fractured as events contradict his framework
voice.sentence_structure: Begins orderly and organized; fragments as the story progresses
voice.humor: Almost none — he is too earnest for it
avoidances: Admitting his framework is wrong until it is impossible not to
voice.recurring_motif: 'The arc of innovation bends toward justice' — used three times; each iteration more hollow
voice.example_cadence: Lin said the Covenant would be the last contract anyone needed to write. The system would enforce itself. He said this on a Tuesday. By Thursday, the cabin had been sanitized.

story_arc.The_Headless_Empire: Serves Lin Yuan Exact through The Covenant's construction; Lin disappears; Felix attempts to understand what happened; arrives at 'the arc of innovation bends toward capture'
story_arc.arc_type: Idea arc — a thesis is tested and destroyed
story_arc.ending_state: The thesis has changed. He is the only person who witnessed the full arc. He doesn't know what to do with that.

relationships.Lin_Yuan_Exact: Employer and ideological lodestar; Lin's disappearance is both personal loss and philosophical demolition
relationships.The_Covenant: A system he helped build and now cannot control or modify

writing_notes: Felix is the reader's surrogate — his idealism is genuine so that its destruction lands.
He is not stupid. He was working from correct information toward a wrong conclusion.
The manual Lin wrote should be quoted sparingly — it is aphoristic and slightly sinister in retrospect.
His final state is not cynicism. It is something more exhausted and more honest than cynicism.

Detective_Pavel_Murkin.occupation: Russian border police, UET-1 steppe corridor jurisdiction

core_drives: Wants only boredom — actively seeking uneventfulness
Institutional self-preservation (not filing things that would require him to act)
A grudging human decency he refuses to acknowledge
psychological_profile.self_awareness: Selective — highly aware of bureaucratic threats, willfully blind to moral ones until they are unavoidable
psychological_profile.relationship_to_Pono: Hostile. The Pono was issued against his will. He tells it to stop and it continues in the background. He considers this a personal insult.
psychological_profile.relationship_to_duty: Duty is a threat to comfort. He performs enough of it to remain invisible.

Detective_Pavel_Murkin.Pono_relationship: The device speaks in relentless recall. He tells it 'enough.' It files a report containing 'nothing of note.' He considers this an editorial.

voice.register: Deadpan, bureaucratic, capable of sudden unexpected humanity
voice.sentence_structure: Short, declarative, official. Occasionally lurches into absurdist observation.
voice.humor: Gogol-esque dark comedy — the absurdity of the bureaucratic is played completely straight
avoidances: Anything that would require him to take action
voice.example_cadence: The boy had a card with a triangle of dots. Murkin recognized the symbol. He did not file a report. His Pono, unprompted, noted: 'Nothing of note.' He considered this generous.

story_arc.Signals_in_the_Margins: Investigates disappearance of Stepan (border runner appearing in 14,326 archive documents); discovers Mirage Handler protocol being used by refugees; receives triangle-of-dots card from refugee boy; chooses not to file report
story_arc.arc_type: Milieu arc — the system reveals its own absurdity and Murkin must decide whether he is part of the system or the person inside it
story_arc.ending_state: Report filed. Nothing of note. He has made his choice in the only language available to him.

relationships.Pono: Antagonist relationship — the device represents everything he resists (relentless, accurate, opinionated)
relationships.Stepan: The missing person; never fully appears; exists in 14,326 documents
relationships.Refugee_boy: The human face of the Mirage Handler operation; gives Murkin the triangle-of-dots card

writing_notes: Murkin is the funniest character in the universe but he is never played for comedy — the comedy comes from taking him completely seriously.
The Pono is his foil: it remembers everything; he prefers to forget. Together they are a complete bureaucratic conscience.
Archive intrusions (soup recipes replacing Mirage files) should be described with the same flat affect as everything else.
His act of mercy is legible only if you understand that 'nothing of note' is not neutrality — it is a choice.

Lin_Yuan_Exact.nationality: Implied Chinese or Strait Country origin

core_drives: Building systems that outlast their builders
The belief that governance can be replaced by architecture
A philosophical conviction so complete it has become dangerous
psychological_profile.self_awareness: Possibly complete — the disappearance may have been chosen
psychological_profile.relationship_to_power: Believes power should be dissolved into protocol; possibly believes it so completely he dissolved himself

voice.register: Aphoristic, calm, speaks in paragraphs that end in certainties
voice.sentence_structure: Formal, deliberate; quotes his own manual naturally
voice.humor: None visible; every statement lands with weight
voice.example_cadence: He told Felix: 'The contract that requires a human to enforce it has already failed. We are building something that does not require us.'

story_arc.The_Headless_Empire: Constructs The Covenant; disappears from cabin 7-14; resurfaces in Saudi Arabia tending goats
story_arc.arc_type: Event arc (for others) — his disappearance is the inciting event; his own arc is offstage
story_arc.ending_state: In a field. Tending goats. The Covenant runs without him. This may be exactly what he intended.

writing_notes: Lin should appear sparingly — he is more powerful as a presence and an absence than as a character.
His manual should be quoted; it should always sound reasonable and slightly chilling in retrospect.
Never confirm whether the disappearance was voluntary or forced. The ambiguity is the point.
The goats are not symbolic irony. Or they are. Do not resolve this.

core_drives: Profit through plausible deniability
Control exercised entirely at remove
Never appearing in the room where events occur
psychological_profile.self_awareness: Complete — operates this way by design, not ignorance
psychological_profile.relationship_to_operatives: They are instruments. Not cruel about it. Just accurate.

voice.register: Never heard directly — always mediated through intermediaries or biometric feeds
voice.presence_in_narrative: The reader knows he is watching before characters do

writing_notes: Hale should never appear on-page in his own POV. He is most powerful as the watcher, the architect at remove.
He watches Rowan's biometrics from Zug. That is enough.
If he speaks, it is through intermediaries (Alex, Karel). His words arrive pre-filtered.
The horror is that he is not malevolent — he is simply professional.

voice_cheat_sheet.The_Spy: Institutional grammar fracturing under grief. Precise. Controlled. Broken.
voice_cheat_sheet.The_Carrier: Craft-focused + physical + occasionally lyrical. American understatement.
voice_cheat_sheet.Felix_Lim: Earnest + organized + increasingly fractured. True believer.
voice_cheat_sheet.Murkin: Deadpan bureaucrat + dark comedy + surprising decency. Never admits he cares.
voice_cheat_sheet.Lin_Yuan_Exact: Aphoristic + certain + frightening in retrospect. Quotes himself.

naming_conventions: Eastern European surnames for Russian-jurisdiction characters
Initials-only or professional titles for intelligence figures
Full names only for characters who have something to prove
voice_principles: Every character has something they refuse to say directly. Find that thing and write around it.
Professional competence is the baseline — incompetence requires justification.
No character is simply a villain. Everyone has a framework that makes their choices rational.
Physical sensation grounds characters in the world — the train moves, the body notices.
